homepage.heroSubline: Legacy Pool Service keeps South Florida pools pristine year-round. Our local expertise handles Miami's unique climate challenges so you don't have to.
aboutText: Founded in 2012, Legacy Pool Service grew from a single truck serving Brickell condos to a full fleet covering Miami-Dade and Broward counties. We've seen firsthand how salt air, hurricane debris, and relentless sun impact pool systems here.

Our approach blends preventative maintenance with responsive repairs. We stock Miami-specific parts like corrosion-resistant pumps and hurricane-rated covers, so your pool stays operational through storm season.
When not servicing pools, our team volunteers with Coral Gables historic preservation projects and teaches pool safety at Miami-Dade Parks programs.

valueProps.title: Climate-Adapted Care
valueProps.description: We specify equipment rated for salt air corrosion and hurricane-force winds common in South Florida.

valueProps.title: Local Parts Network
valueProps.description: Same-day replacements using our relationships with Miami-based suppliers of commercial-grade pool components.

valueProps.title: Storm Preparedness
valueProps.description: Pre-hurricane shutdowns and post-storm debris removal protocols perfected over 12 Miami hurricane seasons.

valueProps.title: Historic Home Expertise
valueProps.description: Specialized techniques for maintaining pools in Art Deco buildings and 1920s Coral Gables estates.

homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule your consultation today and experience Miami-specific pool maintenance done right.

services.name: Saltwater Pool Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Specialized care for Miami's corrosive coastal environment.
services.description:
Saltwater pools dominate Miami's waterfront properties from South Beach to Boca Raton, but the same salt that creates softer water also accelerates equipment corrosion. Our monthly maintenance program includes titanium heat exchanger inspections, sacrificial anode replacements, and cell cleaning tailored to South Florida's brackish groundwater conditions.

We test for salt creep damage on surrounding surfaces - a common issue with Coral Gables' historic pool decks. Our technicians carry marine-grade lubricants and stainless steel fasteners to combat the accelerated wear caused by Miami's salty breezes. For newer installations, we recommend positioning equipment away from prevailing east winds blowing off Biscayne Bay.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive salt level testing with corrosion potential analysis
Step 2: Cell inspection and cleaning using non-acidic solutions safe for Miami's delicate ecosystems
Step 3: Structural assessment of coping stones and deck materials for salt damage
Step 4: Detailed report with recommendations for hurricane season preparation
benefits: Extends equipment lifespan in corrosive coastal air
Prevents costly deck and coping repairs

faq.question: How often should salt cells be cleaned in Miami?
faq.answer: We recommend quarterly cleanings minimum due to our hard water deposits and salt concentration. Wynwood-area pools often need monthly attention during summer algae blooms.

faq.question: Can you service commercial pools near the ocean?
faq.answer: Yes, our team maintains several South Beach hotel pools using commercial-grade salt systems with reinforced components for constant use.

services.name: Hurricane Prep & Recovery
services.shortDescription: Storm-proof your pool before hurricane season hits.
services.description:
From June through November, Miami pools face unique threats from hurricane-force winds and torrential rains. Our proven 48-hour preparation protocol includes lowering water levels to prevent flooding, securing loose equipment, and adding stabilizing chemicals to prevent post-storm algae explosions.

Post-hurricane, we prioritize debris removal from filters and pumps before restarting systems. Many Pembroke Pines homeowners learned the hard way after Hurricane Irma that palm fronds can destroy pumps if not cleared promptly. Our storm teams carry replacement parts for common failures, including wind-damaged skimmer baskets and sand filter laterals cracked by flying debris.
process: Step 1: Pre-storm consultation assessing your pool's specific vulnerabilities
Step 2: Water level adjustment and equipment securing
Step 3: Chemical stabilization to maintain balance during power outages
Step 4: Post-storm debris removal and system restart
benefits: Maintains water chemistry during power outages

faq.question: When should I schedule hurricane prep each year?
faq.answer: Book by May 15th to guarantee service before peak season. We see highest demand when storms enter the Caribbean.

faq.question: Do you handle FEMA documentation for pool damage?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide detailed repair reports with photos that meet FEMA's requirements for historic homes in West Palm Beach and other designated areas.

services.name: Historic Pool Restoration
services.description:
Miami's historic districts from Coral Gables to West Palm Beach contain irreplaceable pool designs - from 1920s tile mosaics to Art Deco geometric shapes. Our restoration specialists use period-appropriate techniques to maintain these landmarks while bringing mechanical systems up to modern efficiency standards.

We source replacement tiles from the same manufacturers used in original Miami Modern pools, matching faded colors from decades of Florida sun exposure. For Brickell's high-rise pools built in the 1960s, we've developed techniques to repair terrazzo decking without damaging underlying structures. Every restoration begins with archival research at the Miami-Dade Historic Preservation Office to ensure authentic repairs.
process: Step 1: Historical documentation review and materials analysis
Step 2: Custom fabrication of period-appropriate components
Step 3: Structural integrity testing of aging pool shells
Step 4: Sensitive installation preserving original design elements
benefits: Maintains property value in historic districts

faq.question: Can you restore original pool paint colors?
faq.answer: Yes, we've cataloged 137 historic Miami pool colors and can recreate even faded hues using spectrographic analysis of remaining pigment samples.

faq.question: Do you work with historic preservation boards?
faq.answer: Our team regularly coordinates with Coral Gables and Miami Beach preservation offices to ensure approvals before beginning restoration projects.

services.name: Algae Prevention & Treatment
services.description:
South Florida's year-round warmth creates ideal conditions for tenacious algae strains that baffle standard treatments. Our algae management program combines weekly brushing with customized chemical protocols based on your microclimate - whether you're battling black algae in Coconut Grove's shaded pools or mustard algae in sunny Aventura high-rises.

We use phosphate removers specifically formulated for Miami's mineral-rich groundwater, which often contributes to recurring blooms. For severe cases, our oxidation treatments avoid copper-based algaecides that stain Coral Springs' light-colored pool finishes. Monthly filter deep-cleans prevent algae spores from taking hold between visits, particularly important for pools surrounded by lush tropical landscaping.
process: Step 1: Algae species identification through microscopic analysis
Step 2: Customized treatment plan based on pool environment
Step 3: Surface agitation and brushing protocol
Step 4: Follow-up water testing and prevention strategy

faq.question: Why does algae keep returning in my pool?
faq.answer: Many Broward County pools receive contaminated fill water high in phosphates. We test for these hidden nutrients that standard treatments miss.

faq.question: Can you treat pools without draining them?
faq.answer: Our oxidation methods successfully clear 90% of algae blooms without draining, preserving Coral Gables' limited water resources during droughts.

services.name: Smart Pool Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Modern controls for Miami's climate challenges.
services.description:
Today's smart pool technology helps Miami homeowners manage their pools remotely during frequent travel or hurricane evacuations. We specialize in integrating systems that withstand South Florida's humidity while providing real-time alerts about leaks, pump failures, or chemical imbalances.

Our recommended equipment includes surge-protected control panels rated for Miami-Dade County's high wind zones and salt-resistant sensors for coastal properties. For historic homes in West Palm Beach, we conceal modern automation systems within period-appropriate housing. Many Brickell condo boards now require our water-saving features that automatically adjust fill levels based on National Weather Service evaporation forecasts.
process: Step 1: Assessment of existing equipment compatibility
Step 2: Selection of Miami-rated smart components
Step 3: Professional installation with surge protection
Step 4: Custom automation programming and owner training
benefits: Leak detection prevents costly water loss

faq.question: Will smart systems work during power outages?
faq.answer: We install battery backups that maintain critical functions for up to 72 hours - crucial for Miami storm seasons.

faq.question: Can I control my pool from my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, our systems integrate with apps that let you adjust settings from anywhere, whether you're in New York for summer or just across Biscayne Bay.

services.name: Pool Deck Resurfacing
services.shortDescription: Durable surfaces for Miami's harsh conditions.
services.description:
Miami's intense sun, salt air, and heavy rains destroy pool deck surfaces faster than anywhere else. We specialize in resurfacing with materials that withstand these challenges while staying cool underfoot - a critical consideration for Brickell's rooftop pools and Coral Gables' expansive pool decks.

Our textured finishes incorporate local coquina shells for slip resistance without the abrasiveness of traditional aggregates. For historic districts, we offer permeable pavers that meet Miami's stormwater runoff requirements while complementing 1920s architecture. Modern micro-topping systems revive worn concrete around Fort Lauderdale's 1960s pools without full demolition, minimizing disruption to mature landscaping.
process: Step 1: Structural assessment of existing deck
Step 2: Material selection based on usage and climate
Step 3: Surface preparation including crack repair
Step 4: Application with temperature-controlled techniques

faq.question: How long will resurfacing last in Miami?
faq.answer: Our premium systems typically last 8-12 years here versus 3-5 years for standard applications, making them cost-effective long-term.

faq.question: Can you match my existing deck color?
faq.answer: We maintain a library of 200+ Miami-specific color formulas to blend repairs seamlessly with aged surfaces.

services.name: Commercial Pool Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Reliable care for Miami's high-traffic pools.
services.description:
From South Beach hotels to Coral Gables country clubs, commercial pools face unique demands in Miami's tourist economy. Our 24/7 service program keeps high-traffic pools operational through equipment failures, contamination events, and health department inspections.

We stock commercial-grade parts like oversized sand filters for Wynwood's boutique hotels and corrosion-resistant chlorinators for oceanfront resorts. Our water testing exceeds Florida health code requirements with additional checks for sunscreen buildup and bather load impacts. For condo associations, we provide detailed usage reports that help budget for peak season demands and off-season conservation.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive system evaluation and code compliance check
Step 2: Customized maintenance schedule based on usage patterns
Step 3: High-capacity equipment installation where needed
Step 4: Continuous water quality monitoring with emergency response
benefits: Extends equipment lifespan in heavy use

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to after-hours emergencies?
faq.answer: Our commercial clients receive guaranteed 2-hour response times 365 days a year - critical for Miami Beach resorts facing health department inspections.

faq.question: Do you handle special event preparations?
faq.answer: Yes, we coordinate with event planners for pool parties and film shoots, ensuring proper chemical levels and equipment protection during unusual usage.

reviews.name: Marcos R.
reviews.text: When Hurricane Nicole hit our Coral Gables home, Legacy had our pool secured and drained to the perfect level. After the storm, they were first on-site to remove debris and had our system running before FPL restored power. Their prep saved our vintage 1970s pump from flood damage.

reviews.name: Elena S.
reviews.text: Restoring our 1926 Mediterranean Revival pool in West Palm Beach required someone who understood historic materials. Legacy sourced perfect matches for the original tiles and repaired the hand-painted coping without damaging the fragile plaster. The preservation board approved everything on first submission.

reviews.name: James L.
reviews.text: Our Brickell condo board hired Legacy to automate all 4 towers' pools. The new system alerts us to leaks immediately - they caught a cracked pipe under Deck 3 that was wasting 200 gallons daily. Remote control from New York during hurricane season is priceless.

reviews.name: Isabella C.
reviews.text: After 3 other companies failed to control the black algae in our Coconut Grove pool, Legacy identified it was feeding on phosphates from our well water. Their weekly brushing protocol and special treatments finally cleared it completely in 6 weeks.

reviews.name: Carlos M.
reviews.text: Living two blocks from the ocean in Miami Beach destroys pool equipment fast. Legacy's quarterly salt cell cleanings and corrosion checks have kept our system running 3 years longer than the manufacturer predicted. Their marine-grade replacement parts make all the difference.

reviews.name: Sophia K.
reviews.text: Our Wynwood guesthouse pool deck was unbearably hot and slippery. Legacy resurfaced it with a cool-touch material that stays comfortable even at midday. The subtle terrazzo flecks match our art collection perfectly. No more burned feet!

service-areas.title: Miami Pool Service Areas | Broward & Dade
service-areas.description: Local pool service covering Miami neighborhoods from Brickell to Coral Gables, plus Fort Lauderdale, Boca Raton, and West Palm Beach.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Pool Service proudly serves Fort Lauderdale, providing expert pool maintenance for its iconic 1960s-70s waterfront homes. The year-round heat and humidity make regular pool care essential to prevent algae growth and equipment wear. Our team specializes in saltwater pool systems, which are popular in coastal properties, ensuring crystal-clear water for your family to enjoy. We understand the unique challenges of maintaining pools in this climate and offer customized service plans to keep your oasis pristine.
serviceAreas.localContext: Fort Lauderdale is known for its historic waterfront homes and boating canals, requiring specialized pool care for its coastal environment.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Pool Service is the trusted choice for Coral Springs homeowners in its meticulously planned 1980s-90s communities. The consistent heat and humidity demand weekly pool maintenance to balance chemicals and protect pool surfaces. Many homes here feature screened enclosures, which require specific care to prevent debris buildup. Our technicians are trained in servicing pools with these enclosures while preserving their integrity. From filter cleanings to pump repairs, we keep your pool ready for year-round enjoyment.
serviceAreas.localContext: Coral Springs is a family-oriented suburb with well-maintained planned communities, where pools are central to outdoor living.

serviceAreas.content: Pembroke Pines residents rely on Legacy Pool Service for professional maintenance in their 1990s planned developments. The subtropical climate means pools here work overtime, requiring expert attention to water chemistry and equipment efficiency. Many homes feature pebble-tec or quartz finishes that need specialized care to maintain their luster. Our team is experienced with these surfaces and the unique filtration needs of larger family pools common in this area. We provide comprehensive service to extend the life of your pool investment.
serviceAreas.localContext: Pembroke Pines features expansive suburban neighborhoods where pools are standard in backyard entertainment spaces.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Pool Service delivers luxury pool maintenance for Boca Raton's prestigious waterfront estates. The combination of intense sun and coastal air requires meticulous chemical balancing to protect high-end pool finishes and automation systems. Many properties feature infinity edges or integrated spas that demand specialized care. Our team is trained in maintaining these sophisticated systems while preserving water clarity and equipment performance. We understand the expectations of discerning homeowners and provide discreet, professional service.
serviceAreas.localContext: Boca Raton is renowned for its upscale coastal properties where pools are centerpieces of luxury outdoor living.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Pool Service provides specialized care for West Palm Beach's historic 1920s-50s homes with classic pool designs. The tropical climate accelerates wear on older pool systems, making regular maintenance crucial. Many historic properties feature unique tile work or vintage equipment that requires knowledgeable handling. Our technicians are experienced with both preserving classic pool charm and updating systems for modern efficiency. We offer gentle yet effective cleaning methods to protect your pool's character while ensuring it meets today's standards.
serviceAreas.localContext: West Palm Beach boasts historic neighborhoods where pools often reflect the architectural period of the homes.

serviceAreas.content: As our home base, Legacy Pool Service provides comprehensive pool care throughout Miami's diverse neighborhoods. The extreme humidity and frequent rain create constant challenges for pool chemistry and cleanliness. From modern high-rises with compact plunge pools to sprawling estate pools, we tailor our approach to each property's needs. Our team stays current with the latest water treatment technologies to combat Miami's unique conditions while being mindful of environmental impacts on our delicate ecosystem.
serviceAreas.localContext: Miami's vibrant mix of architectural styles and intense tropical climate demand adaptable pool service solutions.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Pool Service meets the needs of Davie's equestrian-themed communities and ranch-style properties. The open landscapes mean pools here face more debris from winds, requiring frequent skimming and filter attention. Many homes feature naturalistic lagoon-style pools that need specialized care to maintain their ecosystem balance. Our technicians are skilled in managing these unique water features while keeping them safe and sanitary. We provide services that respect the country atmosphere while delivering professional results.
serviceAreas.localContext: Davie maintains a Western theme with larger properties where pools blend into natural surroundings.

serviceAreas.content: Legacy Pool Service offers premium pool maintenance for Aventura's high-end condominiums and waterfront estates. The coastal location means salt air can be particularly harsh on pool equipment and finishes. Many properties feature sophisticated automation systems that require expert programming and calibration. Our team is experienced with these advanced technologies and the precise water chemistry needed for glass-tile finishes common in luxury buildings. We provide concierge-level service to match Aventura's standards.
serviceAreas.localContext: Aventura is known for its luxury high-rises and meticulous property standards where pools are key amenities.
